Rocket Lab launches 60th Electron, first of multiple missions for BlackSky. Launch took place in New Zealand on Feb 19.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (Nasdaq: RKLB) has launched its 60th Electron rocket from Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1 in Mahia, New Zealand. The mission, named 'Fasten Your Space Belts,' took off at 12:17 NZDT on February 19th (23:15 UTC on February 18th). This launch was to deploy the next satellite for BlackSky, a company specializing in Earth-imaging satellite constellation for real-time space-based intelligence. Rocket Lab is a global leader in launch services and space systems, showcasing its expertise in this successful mission.

RAHVOLT debuts SURGE series in Poland - includes PowerRoller Traveler, PowerRo models, offers energy management with fast battery swapping.
news.summary: In KIELCE, Poland, on February 18, the global leader in distributed residential energy storage solutions, RAHVOLT, unveiled its latest product line, the SURGE series, at the ENEX exhibition. These innovative products offer an all-encompassing energy management solution with fast battery swapping capabilities, a pioneering feature in the sector. The SURGE series currently comprises two models: the PowerRoller Traveler and the PowerRo.

news.summary: The recent report revealed a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week, with over 10,000 new cases and 200 deaths reported. This marks a sharp uptick compared to the previous week, causing concern among health officials. The surge in cases has led to a total of 50,000 active cases in the country, with hospitals reporting an increased strain on resources. In response to the spike, the government has implemented stricter measures, including mandatory mask-wearing and capacity limits for public gatherings. Public health experts are urging the public to adhere to these guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Norway charges 4 in $80M crypto scam; accused laundered $62M via a local law firm's accounts.
news.summary: Officials in Norway have accused the individuals behind a cryptocurrency scheme of laundering a total of $62 million. The funds were allegedly funneled through the accounts of a law firm based in the country.

Investors who bought Polestar Automotive Holding UK PLC (PSNY) securities Nov '22-Jan '25 urged to seek counsel before deadline.
news.summary: Robbins LLP has issued a reminder to stockholders regarding a class action lawsuit filed for individuals or entities who bought or acquired securities of Polestar Automotive Holding UK PLC (NASDAQ: PSNY) between November 14, 2022, and January 16, 2025. The lawsuit mentions specific time periods during which the alleged misconduct occurred, spanning over two years. Investors are encouraged to stay informed about this legal action if they fall within the mentioned purchaser category.

news.headline: Robbins LLP reminds TELUS International investors (NYSE: TIXT) of pending lead plaintiff deadline for class action.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Robbins LLP issued a reminder regarding a class action lawsuit for individuals and entities who bought or acquired securities of TELUS International (Cda) Inc. (NYSE: TIXT) between February 16, 2023, and August 1, 2024. The reminder did not specify the nature or extent of the alleged wrongdoing by TELUS International during that period.

news.headline: Investors in Walgreens Boots Alliance urged to seek counsel before lead plaintiff deadline. Class action filed for those who acquired WBA stock between April 2, 2020, and January 16, 2025. Call to action by Robbins LLP.
news.summary: Reminder for stockholders: A class action has been filed for those who bought or acquired Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc. (NYSE: WBA) common stock between April 2, 2020, and January 16, 2025. The lawsuit includes all individuals and entities involved during this period.

Investors in Arconic Corp. (ARNC) urged to seek counsel by the pending lead plaintiff deadline for a class action lawsuit.
news.summary: In San Diego on February 18, 2025, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to stockholders regarding a class action lawsuit filed for individuals who sold Arconic Corporation (NYSE: ARNC) common stock between April 19, 2022, and May 3, 2023. Arconic, a company specializing in aluminum production, was involved in the lawsuit. The period specified for the class action covers approximately 379 days and entails potential claims for those affected by the stock trading during that time frame. The legal action targets a specific group of individuals who engaged in stock transactions, aiming to address any issues related to the company's stock performance and associated transactions within the mentioned dates.

news.headline: Investors in Cardlytics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDLX) reminded of lawsuit for those who bought CDLX stock Mar 14-Aug 7, 2024. Character count: 116
news.summary: Reminding stockholders, Robbins LLP announced the filing of a class action for investors who bought or acquired Cardlytics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDLX) securities between March 14, 2024, and August 7, 2024. Cardlytics, an advertising company, is at the center of the lawsuit.

Cresset hires Melissa Karetny as Chief People Officer, who completed transition role at J.P. Morgan Chase.
news.summary: In a recent development, Melissa Karetny has finished a transitional position at J.P. Morgan Chase, aiding in the blending of talent and HR procedures post the acquisition of First Republic Bank. The news was shared on February 18, 2025 in San Francisco. Cresset, in an official statement, disclosed the hiring of Melissa Karetny for a new role.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) shares are up premarket after receiving FCC approval to test their satellites with unmodified smartphones, using AT&T and Verizon's low-band spectrum. FCC supports digital access expansion.
news.summary: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ:ASTS) saw an increase in premarket trading on Friday after receiving Special Temporary Authority (STA) from the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) for testing in the U.S. This approval allows AST SpaceMobile's first five commercial BlueBird satellites, currently in low Earth orbit, to operate with standard smartphones using AT&T and Verizon's low-band spectrum. The testing will enable voice calls, data, video applications, and other cellular broadband functions without the need for special software or device updates. The FCC's approval aligns with AST SpaceMobile's goals of expanding digital access, improving emergency communications, and advancing digital transformation.

news.headline: Park Systems introduces expanded FX Large Sample AFM series at SEMICON Korea 2025, following success of Park FX200.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on February 18, 2025, Park Systems introduced the enhanced FX Large Sample AFM series at SEMICON Korea 2025. This new series builds upon the achievements of the Park FX200, introduced at SEMICON West 2024, which has seen significant growth since its launch. This move showcases Park Systems' position as a prominent player in atomic force microscopy (AFM) technology on a global scale. The unveiling took place at one of the leading industry events, highlighting the company's dedication to innovation and advancement in the field.

news.headline: Top mid-cap gainers last week: Akero Therapeutics surged 106.57%, Brinker International gained 25.44%, Viavi rose24.40%.
news.summary: These ten mid-cap stocks have shown remarkable performance in the past week. Among the best performers include Akero Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKRO), whose shares surged by an impressive 106.57% following the release of the Week 96 results from its SYMMETRY Phase 2B study of Efruxifermin, leading to a positive outlook from various analysts. Surgery Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ:SGRY) saw a notable stock increase of 25.44% after receiving a non-binding acquisition proposal from Bain Capital Private Equity. Additionally, Flagstar Financial, Inc. (NYSE:FLG) experienced a significant 24.40% rise in shares post the announcement of better-than-anticipated financial results. Analyst Jared Shaw from Barclays has maintained an Overweight rating on the stock. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Howard Lutnick steps down as BGC Group CEO, confirmed as 41st US Secretary of Commerce. News announced on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC), a prominent global brokerage and financial technology firm, revealed that Howard W. Lutnick, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, has been appointed as the 41st nominee by the United States Senate.

news.headline: Howard Lutnick confirmed as 41st US Secretary of Commerce; steps down from Newmark Board- Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK).
news.summary: In a press release dated February 18, 2025, commercial real estate advisor Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK) revealed key information. The company caters to significant institutions, global corporations, and property owners. Howard W. Lutnick was also mentioned in the announcement.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Thiogenesis Therapeutics Corp to OTCQX, trading under ticker symbol TTIPF. Upgraded from Pink market.
news.summary: Recently, on February 12, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Thiogenesis Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage biotech company, has successfully qualified to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. This market, operated by OTC Markets Group Inc., oversees the trading of 12,000 U.S. and international securities. The company's stock, under the tickers TSX-V: TTI and OTCQX: TTIPF, transitioned to the OTCQX from the Pink® market, signifying an upgrade in its trading status.

news.headline: Fabrinet beats Q2 earnings with revenue of $833.6 million and EPS of $2.61. Datacom demand moderates. CEO optimistic.
news.summary: Shares of Fabrinet (NYSE:FN) are experiencing a premarket dip following the release of its second-quarter results. The company reported a revenue of $833.6 million, surpassing the expected $814.3 million consensus. Additionally, the adjusted EPS stood at $2.61, exceeding the projected $2.50. Seamus Grady, the CEO of Fabrinet, highlighted the strong telecom performance driven by the increasing demand for datacenter interconnect products and early success from recent systems wins. Although there has been a slight moderation in datacom demand in the near term, the overall outlook appears positive.

Vincent Renz appointed CEO and Board Member of Tanke Biosciences Corp on Feb 9, 2025.
news.summary: On February 12, 2025, in Las Vegas, NV, Tanke Biosciences Corp revealed that Vincent Renz will take over as the Chief Executive Officer and also be a part of the Board of Directors, starting from February 9, 2025. The Company operates under the stock symbol OTC: TNBI.

news.headline: RBNZ sees employment growth picking up in second half of 2025
Coffee prices have surged over 100%, reaching $3.90 per pound and outperforming major stock indices. Supply chain disruptions may lead to a $10 cup of coffee.
news.summary: The US, the world's largest coffee market, is facing a surge in coffee prices not seen since 1977. With 66% of the population daily drinking 2-3 cups, the average intake is significant. Coffee prices have soared to record levels, up 20% in just over a month, making it the best-performing asset of 2025. Arabica coffee futures have risen for 10 consecutive sessions, with prices now at $3.90 per pound, up 100% from a year ago. This spike may lead to rising inflation in the supply chain, potentially leading to a $10 cup of coffee. Companies in the coffee supply chain could benefit from this surge.

news.headline: Stephen Merkel appointed Chairman of BGC Group's Board of Directors; Brandon Lutnick joins board. Located in New York, BGC is a global brokerage and financial technology company listed on Nasdaq under ticker symbol BGC.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC), a prominent global brokerage and financial technology firm, disclosed that Stephen Merkel has been appointed as the Chairman of the Board of Directors. Additionally, Brandon Lutnick is set to also join the Board. This news marks a significant development for the company's leadership team.

Trump eases stance on inflation after promising quick price cuts; administration admits it will take longer.
news.summary: During his campaign, President Trump promised to reduce costs on his first day in office. However, his administration has now admitted that achieving this goal will require more time than initially anticipated.

news.headline: Rudy Giuliani joins FrankSpeech Network board. Mayor appointed Director at Mike Lindell Media Corp.
news.summary: Rudy Giuliani, former mayor, has agreed to join the board of directors at FrankSpeech Network, also known as Mike Lindell Media Corp. The company is listed as OTC:PINK FSBN.

news.headline: Guangzhou leads China's export with booming industry along the Pearl River, flooding world with duty-free cheap clothes, toys.
news.summary: In the southern region of China along the Pearl River, there is a booming industry that is rapidly producing affordable clothing and toys. These products are being exported worldwide without incurring any duty fees.
